pageDescription: Determine how much house you can afford based on your income and expenses with comprehensive analysis including debt-to-income ratios and down payment requirements

rules.title: Affordability Rules
rules.description: 28/36 rule: Housing costs ≤ 28% of gross income, Total debt ≤ 36% of gross income

downPayment.title: Down Payment Impact
downPayment.description: Larger down payments reduce loan amount and may eliminate PMI requirement

dti.title: Debt-to-Income Ratio
dti.description: Lenders typically prefer DTI ratios below 43% for qualified mortgages

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides house affordability estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual affordability may vary based on credit score, lender policies, and market conditions

importantNotesList: Lenders consider credit score, employment history, and assets in addition to income
Closing costs typically range from 2-5% of home price
Emergency fund should cover 3-6 months of housing expenses
Consider maintenance costs of 1-3% of home value annually

messages.enterInformation: Enter your financial information to determine house affordability
messages.resultMessage: Your house affordability calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides house affordability estimates based on general financial guidelines. Actual affordability may vary based on credit score, lender policies, market conditions, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized house affordability analysis and mortgage advice, consult mortgage brokers or financial advisors with expertise in home lending and individual financial circumstances.

errors.annualIncome: Please enter a valid annual gross income
errors.monthlyDebts: Please enter valid monthly debt payments
errors.downPayment: Please enter a valid down payment
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid expected mortgage interest rate
errors.loanTerm: Please enter a valid loan term
errors.propertyTax: Please enter a valid annual property tax rate
errors.homeInsurance: Please enter a valid annual home insurance cost
errors.hoaFees: Please enter valid monthly HOA fees
errors.otherHousingCosts: Please enter valid other monthly housing costs
errors.downPaymentType: Please select a down payment type

tooltips.annualIncome: Your total annual gross income before taxes
tooltips.monthlyDebts: Total monthly payments for all debts (car loans, student loans, credit cards, etc.)
tooltips.downPayment: Amount you plan to pay upfront toward home purchase
tooltips.downPaymentType: Whether down payment is specified as amount or percentage
tooltips.interestRate: Expected annual interest rate on mortgage loan
tooltips.loanTerm: Length of time to repay the mortgage (typically 15 or 30 years)
tooltips.propertyTax: Annual property tax rate assessed by local government
tooltips.hoaFees: Monthly fees for Homeowners Association services
tooltips.otherHousingCosts: Other monthly housing-related expenses (utilities, maintenance, etc.)

how_would_you_like_to_calculate_2: How would you like to calculate?
housing_costs_as_of_gross_income_typical: Housing costs as % of gross income (typically 28%)
total_debt_as_of_gross_income_typically_: Total debt as % of gross income (typically 36%)
include_mortgage_taxes_insurance_and_hoa: Include mortgage, taxes, insurance, and HOA fees
how_much_house_you_can_afford_28: How much house you can afford
enter_your_information_to_see_how_much_h: Enter your information to see how much house you can afford
how_much_house_can_i_afford_44: How Much House Can I Afford?
determining_how_much_house_you_can_affor:
Determining how much house you can afford depends on several key factors including your income,
                      existing debts, down payment, and the current mortgage rates. Lenders typically use two main
                      ratios to evaluate your affordability:
your_total_housing_costs_should_not_exce:
Your total housing costs should not exceed 28% of
                        your gross monthly income
your_total_debt_payments_should_not_exce:
Your total debt payments should not exceed 36% of
                        your gross monthly income
frontend_max_monthly_income_frontend_rat: Front-End Max = Monthly Income × Front-End Ratio
backend_max_monthly_income_backend_ratio: Back-End Max = (Monthly Income × Back-End Ratio) - Monthly Debts
max_housing_budget_minfrontend_max_backe: Max Housing Budget = min(Front-End Max, Back-End Max)
where_l_loan_amount_r_monthly_rate_n_num: Where: L = Loan Amount, r = Monthly Rate, n = Number of Payments
total_mortgage_property_tax_insurance_ho: Total = Mortgage + Property Tax + Insurance + HOA
k_100000_annual_income_500_monthly_debts:
$100,000 annual income, $500 monthly debts, 30-year mortgage at 6%,
                          20% down payment
monthly_income_8333_frontend_max_2333_ba:
Monthly income = $8,333, Front-end max = $2,333, Back-end max =
                          $2,500
fixed_budget_of_2500month_same_loan_para: Fixed budget of $2,500/month, same loan parameters as above
